# College Blood Bank

> A campus blood bank directory where students can register as donors, find matching donors by blood group, and post or update blood requests for fellow students.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the campus blood bank with donor stats and quick actions.
- [Register as Donor](/register): Sign in by phone or register as a new student donor.
- [Request Blood](/request): Post a blood request and browse open requests by blood group, urgency, and hospital.
